Bash(1 <<'EOF'
from django.contrib.auth.models import Permission
from django.contrib.contenttypes.models import ContentType

# Get Vitals model
from patients.models import Vitals
ct = ContentType.objects.get_for_model\(Vitals\)
permissions = Permission.objects.filter\(content_type=ct\)
print\("Vitals permissions:"\)
for p in permissions:
    print\(f"  {p.codename}: {p.name}"\)
EOF)

Bash(1 <<'EOF'
from django.contrib.auth.models import Permission

# Get all permissions for key apps
for app in ['patients', 'pharmacy', 'laboratory', 'billing', 'inpatient', 'appointments', 'consultations', 'accounts', 'reporting', 'radiology']:
    perms = Permission.objects.filter\(content_type__app_label=app\).values_list\('codename', flat=True\)
    print\(f"\\n{app}:"\)
    print\("  All permissions:"\)
    for p in sorted\(perms\)[:15]:  # First 15
        print\(f"    {p}"\)
    if len\(list\(perms\)\) > 15:
        print\(f"    ... and {len\(list\(perms\)\)-15} more"\)
EOF)
